summary: Nice audience recording that sounds better than most 1995 shows.
review: The tap is an audience recording praised for its clarity and overall listenability, standing out among many 1995 recordings. While reviewers note it’s a pleasant listening experience, no specific musical moments or song performances are highlighted.

ai_rating.rationale: Positive remarks about the audience recording quality and its superiority to typical 1995 tapes, but no detailed comments on performance; rating reflects good sound with limited show information.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear enough for an audience tap; reviewer calls it "very nice" and better than most 1995 recordings.
